mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM deleted_nodes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND hostname = #{hostname}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM deleted_nodes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND hostname = #{hostname}
DELETE dn FROM deleted_nodes dn LEFT JOIN nodes n ON n.user_id = dn.user_id AND n.name = dn.hostname AND n.status = 'D' WHERE n.id IS NULL AND dn.deleted_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE)
